CustomObject.label: VS Holiday
CustomObject.description: F-001 slot-booking-core (VS-01, EP-01). Per-facility closure dates read by VS-06 slot generation (REQ-009); a session flagged VS_Is_Drive_Day__c overrides a closure for that facility+date only (D-018). OWD Public Read Only (design §2.2). Retention class (Annexure C4): permanent reference — never purged by VS_RetentionPurgeBatch.
